title: S/4HANA Migration Fundamentals
description: Comprehensive introduction to SAP S/4HANA migration strategies including Greenfield, Brownfield, and Selective Data Transition (SDT) approaches. Covers system landscape design, data migration tools (LTMC/LTMOM), and go-live planning best practices.

title: SAP BTP Architecture and Services
description: Deep dive into SAP Business Technology Platform including Cloud Foundry, Kyma runtime, Integration Suite, and Extension Suite. Learn how BTP serves as the integration and extension layer for SAP S/4HANA and SuccessFactors.

title: SuccessFactors Employee Central Configuration
description: Hands-on configuration of SuccessFactors Employee Central covering org structures, position management, business rules, and workflow design. Includes integration patterns with SAP S/4HANA Payroll and Finance.

title: AI and Machine Learning on SAP BTP
description: Practical guide to building AI-powered applications using SAP AI Core, SAP AI Launchpad, and the Generative AI Hub. Covers prompt engineering, RAG patterns, and responsible AI governance in an enterprise SAP context.

title: Change Management for S/4HANA Transformations
description: Structured change management methodology for large-scale SAP S/4HANA programs. Covers stakeholder analysis, communication planning, training needs assessment, and adoption measurement using Prosci ADKAR and SAP Activate.

title: SAP Integration Suite — API Management
description: Design and govern APIs using SAP Integration Suite API Management. Topics include API proxies, rate limiting, OAuth 2.0 security, developer portals, and integration with SAP S/4HANA OData services.

title: SAP Datasphere and Analytics Cloud
description: Build enterprise data fabrics using SAP Datasphere (formerly Data Warehouse Cloud) and SAP Analytics Cloud. Covers space design, data layer modeling, live connections to S/4HANA, and AI-assisted story creation.

title: Hire-to-Retire Process Design
description: End-to-end process design for the Hire-to-Retire (H2R) value chain spanning SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting, Onboarding, Employee Central, and Time Management, with payroll handoff to S/4HANA HCM.

title: SAP Fiori UX Design and Development
description: Design and develop SAP Fiori applications using SAPUI5 and SAP Fiori Elements. Covers UX best practices, OData V4 service integration, and deployment to SAP BTP or S/4HANA embedded Fiori Launchpad.

title: SAP Activate Methodology for Cloud Projects
description: Master the SAP Activate project management methodology for cloud deployments. Covers Discover, Prepare, Explore, Realize, Deploy, and Run phases with fit-to-standard workshops and agile sprint planning.
